description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Famille très accueillante et disponible en cas de besoin. Chambre spacieuse, aménagement pratique.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The contact number published in the media cannot be reached. When checking in, I was told that it had been canceled and the room was sold to someone else. I'm really disappointed.
comments.reviewTitle: It's unclear, either Agoda or the accommodation.
comments.originalTitle: Tidak jelas, entah agoda atau penginanapan
comments.originalComment: No kontak yang di publikasi di media tidak bisa di hubungi. Waktu check-in katanya sudah dibatalkan hingga kamar dijual untuk orang lain. Sungguh kecewa

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: no hot water, overpriced, in fact the price range is from 160 to 180,000
comments.reviewPositives: good hosts, provided soap and a towel, helped with a broken phone, overall good environment, large rooms, large beds, a room with a large window (which is rare in Indonesia)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It makes me very happy, because it's calm and feels like home, the father and mother are friendly, and I was served directly by the homeowners. The air conditioning is cold, remember to bring a towel and toiletries. The room is located on the 2nd floor, accessed from the lobby through the side door. Affordable but not cheap.. the mattress is comfortable, the bed sheets are cool. It's a 7-minute walk to Aceh Plaza and a 3-minute walk to the main culinary street. Thank you, Balqis Homestay.
comments.originalComment:
Buat saya sangat menyenangkan,karena tenang dan seperti dirumah sendiri,bapak dan ibu nya ramah, lsg dilayani pemilik rumah.
Ac dingin,ingat bawa handuk dan perlengkapan mandi. Letak kamar di lt2.masuk dari lobby pintu samping.
Murah gak murahan.. kasurnya enak,spreinya adem. 7menit jalan ke plaza Aceh.dan 3menit ke jalan besar kulineran. Terimakasih Balqis homestay.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
